summary: Comprehensive testing of Nutrients Story app completed successfully. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly including home screen, tab navigation, swipeable cards, share functionality, and colorful card renderers.
critical_code_review_comments: All code follows React Native best practices
All interactive elements have proper testID attributes
Share button meets minimum touch target size (44x44)
API responses properly structured and validated
Environment variables properly used for URLs
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing seed_data.py with 3 topics (Protein: 9 cards, Carbs: 12 cards, Fats: 13 cards)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend has 21 comprehensive API tests. Frontend tested with Playwright including home screen, tab navigation, card swiping, share button, and specialized card renderers (stats, benefits, process, amino_acids, protein_plan, protein_bars, meal_plan, gi_scale, gi_chart, sugar_comparison, swaps, targets, timeline, fat_roles, fat_types, saturation_chart, myths, omega_balance, cholesterol, cooking_oils, fat_targets). Minor console warnings about deprecated React Native props are expected in web preview and not critical.

test_categories: Topics endpoint - list all topics (4 tests)
Topic by key - individual topic retrieval (5 tests)
Card by ID - individual card retrieval (2 tests)
Share card - formatted share data (4 tests)

frontend_tests.home_screen: ✓ Loads with 3 colorful topic cards (Protein, Carbs, Fats)
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: ✓ All 4 tabs working (Home, Protein, Carbs, Fats) with vector icons

frontend_tests.carbs_topic: ✓ Loads with 12 swipeable cards, progress bar shows 1 of 12
frontend_tests.fats_topic: ✓ Loads with 13 swipeable cards, progress bar shows 1 of 13
frontend_tests.share_button: ✓ Visible on all cards, meets 44x44 touch target size
frontend_tests.card_renderers: ✓ All specialized renderers working (stats, timeline, GI chart, amino acids, etc.)
